attributes.action: Retain Proposed Ban on Fur and Foie Gras Imports into the UK
attributes.additional_details: These are extremely cruel practices and were the subject of a clear manifesto commitment upon which the present government was elected. The proposed bans should not now be the subject of a ‘U-turn’, as has been widely reported.
attributes.background: We call on the Government to proceed as quickly as possible with its pledge to ban the import and sale of all fur and foie gras products in the UK.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Urgently ban the import and sale of foie gras and fur products in the UK" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/766801
